validationPassed.Evidence: File covers all rules called out in issue #1745: circuit breaker (named section), timeouts on outbound calls (named section), bulkheads (named section), retries bounded with backoff and idempotency keys (named section), health check integrity (named section), queue and buffer bounding (named section), graceful degradation (named section). workLog.action: Read candidates file and confirmed branch context. Issue #1745 (priority:P2, area-prompts, agent-orchestrator, assignee rjmurillo-bot) selected by wrapper-created branch feat/1745-autonomous. Confirmed no existing PR for #1745 via gh pr list search.
workLog.outcome: Issue body specifies: create .claude/rules/release-it.md from agent-rules-books source; cover circuit breakers, timeouts, bulkheads, bounded idempotent retries with backoff, health check integrity, queue/buffer bounding, graceful degradation; conditional activation for orchestration, service integration, external API/queue code; not for internal utility/helper code.

workLog.action: Surveyed sibling rules PRs (#1759 code-quality, #1762 enterprise-patterns). Adopted the same .claude/rules/ schema: frontmatter (description + alwaysApply), H1, sectioned content, accompanying session log. Source file `raw/articles/agent-rules-books/release-it.md` lives in an Obsidian Vault outside the repo and is not present in the worktree; authored the rule from Nygard's well-known pattern set rather than fabricate a path.
workLog.outcome: Established frontmatter convention. Set alwaysApply: false because Release It! patterns are situational (orchestration, integration points), not everyday fundamentals. Description scopes activation.

workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/release-it.md with frontmatter and 11 sections: Core Vocabulary, Integration Points Are Suspect, Timeouts on Every Outbound Call, Circuit Breaker, Bulkheads, Retries (Bounded, Idempotent, Backed Off), Health Check Integrity, Bound Every Queue and Buffer, Slow Responses Are Failures, Graceful Degradation Over Hard Failure, Stability Anti-Patterns to Reject in Review, Boundaries with the Existing Codebase, Quick Self-Review.
workLog.outcome: ~16KB single file. All seven verification items from the issue spec are present. Boundaries section ties rule to ai-agents orchestrator, lifecycle hooks (SessionStart/PreToolUse/PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit/Stop), skills as entry points, MCP servers, gh CLI, model providers, and Serena/Forgetful as integration points. Anti-Patterns section captures cascading failure, chain reaction, shared resource exhaustion, unbalanced capacities, capacity by hope, blocking I/O on hot paths, self-inflicted DoS, cookie-monster logging.

workLog.action: Created session log at .agents/sessions/2026-04-25-session-1745-release-it-rules.json mirroring the schema used in PR #1762.
workLog.outcome: Session log present for session-log guard before commit.
